serializableData.oldContent: All symbols pay from left to right on adjacent reels starting from the leftmost reel.
This is the WILD symbol and substitutes for all symbols except for SCATTER.
It can appear only on reels 2, 3 and 4 during base game spins and also on reel 5 during FREE SPINS and RANDOM AWARDS.
It can appear only on reels 2, 3 and 4.
Wins awarded for left to right adjacent symbol combinations.

The TUMBLE FEATURE means that after every spin, winning combinations are paid and all winning symbols disappear. The remaining symbols fall to the bottom of the screen and the empty positions are replaced with new symbols coming from above.
Tumbling will continue until no more winning combinations appear as a result of a tumble.
All wins are added to the player's balance after all of the tumbles resulted from a base spin have been played.
Hit 3 SCATTER symbols to win a random award as follows:
WILD WINS - At the end of all tumbles, the grid clears and a new result with 2, 3, 4, 5 or 7 WILD symbols randomly added appears guaranteeing at least one winning combination.

WILD WINS+ - At the end of all tumbles, the grid clears and a new result with 2, 3, 4, 5 or 7 WILD symbols randomly added appears guaranteeing at least one winning combination. A multiplier of x2, x3, x4, x5 or x10 is also selected randomly to apply to subsequent wins during this spin.
FREE SPINS - The FREE SPINS feature is triggered with 6, 8, 10, 15 or 25 starting free spins being awarded randomly.

FREE SPINS+ - The FREE SPINS feature is triggered with 6, 8, 10, 15 or 25 starting free spins being awarded randomly. A multiplier of x2, x3, x4, x5 or x10 is also selected randomly to apply to all wins in the subsequent free spins round.
The FREE SPINS round starts with a random amount of spins awarded by the RANDOM AWARD.
Hit 3 SCATTER symbols during the round to win RANDOM AWARDS for the current feature:
WILD WINS - At the end of all tumbles, the grid clears and a new result with 2, 3, 4, 5 or 7 WILD symbols randomly added appears guaranteeing at least one winning combination.

WILD WINS+ - At the end of all tumbles, the grid clears and a new result with 2, 3, 4, 5 or 7 WILD symbols randomly added appears guaranteeing at least one winning combination. A multiplier of x2, x3, x4, x5 or x10 is also selected randomly to apply to subsequent wins during this free spin. If the round has a FREE SPINS multiplier, the WILD multiplier and the FREE SPINS multiplier multiply each other before applying to the win.
FREE SPINS - The FREE SPINS feature is retriggered with 3, 5, 10, 15 or 20 starting free spins being awarded randomly.

FREE SPINS+ - The FREE SPINS feature is retriggered with 3, 5, 10, 15 or 20 additional free spins being awarded randomly. A multiplier of x2, x3, x4 or x5 is also selected randomly to apply to all wins in the subsequent free spins. If the round already has a FREE SPINS multiplier, the new value adds to the current one.
Special reels are in play during the feature.
The maximum win amount is limited to {0}x bet. If the total win of a FREE SPINS round reaches {1}x bet the round immediately ends, win is awarded and all remaining free spins are forfeited.

The maximum win amount is limited to {0}x bet except Jackpot. If the total win of a FREE SPINS round reaches {1}x bet the round immediately ends, win is awarded and all remaining free spins are forfeited.
The player has the option to select the bet multiplier. Depending on the selected bet, the game behaves differently. The possible values are:
Bet multiplier 30x - the chance to win a RANDOM AWARD naturally is higher. More SCATTER symbols are present on the reels. The BUY FREE SPINS feature is disabled.
The player has the option to increase the bet multiplier to 30x bet per winning combination. When playing with ante bet active, the chance to win a RANDOM AWARD naturally is higher.
The FREE SPINS round can be instantly triggered from the base game by buying it 70x current total bet.

When buying the FREE SPINS feature, the FREE SPINS or the FREE SPINS+ RANDOM AWARDS will hit randomly, with a random amount of free spins awarded and a random free spins multiplier if the FREE SPINS+ RANDOM AWARD is won.
High volatility games pay out less often on average but the chance to hit big wins in a short time span is higher.
All symbols pay from left to right on selected payways.
All wins are multiplied by bet per way.
All values are expressed as actual wins in coins.
Only the highest win is paid per way.
When winning on multiple payways, all wins are added to the total win.
Free spins win is awarded to the player after the round completes.
Free spins total win in the history contains the whole win of the cycle.
The theoretical RTP of this game is {0}%
The RTP of the game when using the "ANTE BET" is {0}%
The RTP of the game when using "BUY FREE SPINS" is {0}%
SPACE and ENTER buttons on the keyboard can be used to start and stop the spin.
Malfunction voids all pays and plays.
Random awards are given through a wheel that exists only as a graphical representation for entertainment purposes.
RANDOM AWARDS OF WILDS OR FREE SPINS WITH MULTIPLIERS UP TO 10X
RANDOM AWARDS OF WILDS OR FREE SPINS WITH MULTIPLIERS UP TO 10X
MIN TOTAL BET TO BUY FREE SPINS

serializableData._text:
最後一次免
費旋轉

雙倍機會
 贏得功能

雙倍機會
 贏得功能

剩余免费
旋转次数
功能期間會出現特殊捲軸。
鍵盤上的空格鍵和 ENTER 按鍵可用於開始和停止旋轉。
玩家可以選擇將賭注倍增指數增大至每個贏獎組合30x賭注。如果在遊戲時啟用底注，隨機贏得隨機獎勵的概率更高。
所有獎金都會乘以每條路線的賭注。
最大獎金金額限制為{0}x賭注，但累積獎金除外。如果免費旋轉回合的總獎金達到{1}x賭注，回合立即結束並派發獎金，所有剩餘免費旋轉次數作廢。
在基本遊戲中以70x當前總賭注進行購買即可馬上觸發免費旋轉回合。

購買免費旋轉功能時，會隨機觸發免費旋轉或免費旋轉+隨機獎勵，隨機授予免費旋轉次數；
若贏得免費旋轉+隨機獎勵，還會獲得隨機免費旋轉倍增指數。
它只會出現在第2、3和4捲軸上。
故障會使所有賠付及遊戲無效。
歷史記錄中的免費旋轉總獎金包含了整個過程中的全部獎金。
獎金按相鄰符號組合從左到右賠付。
免費旋轉獎金在回合結束後獎給玩家。
WILD贏獎 - 所有翻轉結束後，網格清零，隨機添加2、3、4、5或7個WILD符號形成新結果，保證至少出現一個贏獎組合。
玩家可以選擇賭注倍增指數。遊戲可能會因所選的賭注而有所不同。可能的金額包括：
所有符號在選中賠付路線上從左到右賠付。
在多個勝法上贏獎時，所有獎金會加入總獎金中。
波動性較高的遊戲通常較少賠付，但在短時間內贏取大獎的幾率更高。
使用「購買免費旋轉」時的遊戲RTP為{0}%

翻轉功能意味著在每次旋轉之後，贏獎組合將被賠付並且所有贏獎符號都將消失。
剩餘的符號會掉落到畫面底部，空位置將被上方落下的新符號佔據。
翻轉將繼續，直至不再出現贏獎組合作爲翻轉結果。
賭注倍增指數30x - 隨機贏得隨機獎勵的概率更高。捲軸上會出現更多SCATTER符號。「購買免費旋轉」功能已禁用。
出現3個SCATTER符號即可贏得以下隨機獎勵：
賭注倍增指數20x - 普通遊戲
每條路線僅賠付最高獎金。

WILD贏獎+ - 所有翻轉結束後，網格清零，隨機添加2、3、4、5或7個WILD符號形成新結果，
保證至少出現一個贏獎組合。同時隨機選擇x2、x3、x4、x5或x10的倍增指數，適用於本次旋轉的後續贏獎。
WILD贏獎 - 所有翻轉結束後，網格清零，隨機添加2、3、4、5或7個WILD符號形成新結果，保證至少出現一個贏獎組合。

最大獎金金額限制為{0}x賭注。如果免費旋轉回合的總獎金達到{1}x賭注，
回合立即結束並派發獎金，所有剩餘免費旋轉次數作廢。
所有數值均為實際獎金的硬幣數。

WILD贏獎+ - 所有翻轉結束後，網格清零，隨機添加2、3、4、5或7個WILD符號形成新結果，
保證至少出現一個贏獎組合。同時隨機選擇x2、x3、x4、x5或x10的倍增指數，適用於本次免
費旋轉的後續贏獎。如果該回合有免費旋轉倍增指數，WILD倍增指數與免費旋轉倍增指數會在
套用於贏獎前彼此相乘。
在基本旋轉中的所有翻轉均已結束後，所有獎金會被添加到玩家的餘額中。

這是WILD符號並可替代除SCATTER
之外的其他所有符號。
使用「底注」時遊戲的玩家回報率(RTP)為{0}%
所有符號在相連捲軸上從最左捲軸開始從左至右賠付。
回合期間出現3個SCATTER符號即可贏得當前功能的隨機獎勵：
免費旋轉回合以隨機獎勵授予的隨機旋轉次數開始。

它僅在基本遊戲旋轉期間出現在第2、
3和4捲軸上，在免費旋轉和隨機獎勵
期間還會出現在第5捲軸上。
免費旋轉 - 觸發免費旋轉功能，隨機獎勵 6、8、10、15 或 25 次初始免費旋轉。
免費旋轉+ - 觸發免費旋轉功能，隨機獎勵 6、8、10、15 或 25 次初始免費旋轉。同時會隨機選擇 x2、x3、x4、x5 或 x10 的倍數，適用於後續免費旋轉回合的所有贏獎。
免費旋轉 - 免費旋轉功能會再次觸發，隨機獎勵 3、5、10、15 或 20 次初始免費旋轉。
免費旋轉+ – 免費旋轉功能會再次觸發，並隨機獎勵 3、5、10、15 或 20 次額外免費旋轉。同時會隨機選擇 x1, x2、x3、x4 或 x5 的倍增倍數，適用於後續免費旋轉回合的所有獎金。若該回合已具有免費旋轉倍數，新倍數會加到現有倍數上。
隨機獎勵透過一個僅作為圖形展示、用於娛樂目的的轉輪派發。
隨機獎勵包括WILD或帶有最高10X倍增指數的免費旋轉
隨機獎勵包括WILD或帶有最高10X倍增指數的免費旋轉
